ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the incident occurred */,
  "highway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the highway where the incident occurred */,
  "user_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of highway user involved */,
  "rail_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of rail equipment involved */,
  "calendar_year" INTEGER /* Year when the incident occurred */,
  "user_speed" REAL /* Speed of the highway user at the time of the incident */,
  "non_suicide_fatality" INTEGER /* Number of non-suicide fatalities in the incident */,
  "non_suicide_injury" INTEGER /* Number of non-suicide injuries in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident occurred */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "alcohol_involvement" INTEGER /* Whether alcohol was involved in the incident */,
  "drug_involvement" INTEGER /* Whether drugs were involved in the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_user_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_type_id") REFERENCES user_types ("user_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_highway_id FOREIGN KEY ("highway_id") REFERENCES highways ("highway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_rail_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("rail_equipment_id") REFERENCES rail_equipment_types ("rail_equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the county (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highways" (
  "highway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highway */,
  "highway_name" TEXT /* Name of the highway */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the highway is located */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the highway in kilometers */,
  "average_daily_traffic" INTEGER /* Average daily traffic on the highway */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the highway */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the highway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_highways_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_types" (
  "user_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user type */,
  "user_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the user type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user type */,
  "average_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Average speed limit for this type of user */,
  "safety_risk_factor" REAL /* Safety risk factor for this type of user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rail_equipment_types" (
  "rail_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rail equipment type */,
  "rail_equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the rail equipment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rail equipment type */,
  "average_speed" INTEGER /* Average speed of the rail equipment */,
  "safety_risk_factor" REAL /* Safety risk factor for this type of rail equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rail_equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was logged */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident was logged */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Person or entity that reported the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "investigation_officer" TEXT /* Name of the officer investigating the incident */,
  "investigation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., transportation official, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the incident location */,
  "intersection" TEXT /* Name of the intersection if applicable */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the incident location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_locations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
